title: 3D fluorescence anisotropy imaging using selective plane illumination microscopy.
author: Hedde PN Ranjit S Gratton E
content: S-EPMC4646523 PMC4646523 3D fluorescence anisotropy imaging using selective plane illumination microscopy.
